case_title: CHEW, ANDREW VS CELLULAR GOPHER et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO PRESERVE EXHIBITS, FILED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CELLULAR GOPHER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CELLULAR GOPHER YIM, EDWIN $410.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $505.00, DEFENDANT MAY SATISFY THE $410, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT BY EFFECTING A CREDIT ON PLAINTIFF'S CREDIT CARD; AND PLAINTIFF SHALL COOPERATE WITH DEFENDANT IN THE CREDIT PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,400.00 FILED BY CHEW, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT CELLULAR GOPHER YIM, EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
